four_driver_init.tooltip: Initialize the four-channel brushed motor driver

four_driver_set_speed.message0: Set motor speed LF %1 RF %2 LR %3 RR %4 cm/s
four_driver_set_speed.tooltip: Set the speed of each of the four motors in centimeters per second

four_driver_move.tooltip: Move the car in the selected direction for the specified distance

four_driver_keep_move.tooltip: Keep the car moving in the selected direction

four_driver_turn.tooltip: Rotate by the specified angle, direction, and speed

four_driver_track.message0: Track target X coordinate %1 Y coordinate %2
four_driver_track.tooltip: Automatically track a target and adjust speed according to target distance

four_driver_calibration_gyro.tooltip: Calibrate the gyro static bias; keep the car still during calibration

four_driver_calibration_head.tooltip: Calibrate the heading angle to the specified value

beep_set.tooltip: Control the buzzer state for debugging or status feedback

led_set.tooltip: Control the LED state for debugging or status feedback

photoelectricity_init.message0: Use sensor port %1 to initialize grayscale sensor

photoelectricity_set_black.tooltip: Place the sensor on a black line, then run this command to finish black calibration

photoelectricity_set_white.tooltip: Place the sensor on a white area, then run this command to finish white calibration

photoelectricity_get_position.tooltip: Get deviation data calculated by the grayscale sensor, mainly for single-line tracking

photoelectricity_get_value.message0: Get raw data sensor ID %1 channel %2
photoelectricity_get_value.tooltip: Get raw data from the sensor

photoelectricity_get_value_bin.message0: Get binary data sensor ID %1 channel %2
photoelectricity_get_value_bin.tooltip: Get binarized sensor data; 1 means white and 0 means black

photoelectricity_get_black_num.message0: Get black point count sensor ID %1
photoelectricity_get_black_num.tooltip: Get the number of black points detected by the sensor

photoelectricity_get_white_num.message0: Get white point count sensor ID %1
photoelectricity_get_white_num.tooltip: Get the number of white points detected by the sensor

openart_mini_begin.tooltip: Initialize the vision recognition device, which communicates mainly over serial

openart_mini_detection_object.message0: Recognize object with L_MIN:%1 L_MAX:%2 A_MIN:%3 A_MAX:%4 B_MIN:%5 B_MAX:%6
openart_mini_detection_object.tooltip: Send an object recognition command with custom LAB thresholds

openart_mini_detection_apriltag.tooltip: Send a command to detect an AprilTag code

openart_mini_get_coord_x.tooltip: Get the X coordinate of the recognized object

openart_mini_get_coord_y.tooltip: Get the Y coordinate of the recognized object

robotic_arm_set_servo_motor_angle.message0: Set channel %1 servo angle to %2 degrees
robotic_arm_set_servo_motor_angle.tooltip: Set the servo angle for the selected channel

robotic_arm_set_servo_motor_offset_angle.message0: Set channel %1 servo angle offset to %2 degrees
robotic_arm_set_servo_motor_offset_angle.tooltip: Set the servo angle offset for the selected channel

robotic_arm_get_servo_motor_angle.message0: Get current angle of channel %1 servo
robotic_arm_get_servo_motor_angle.tooltip: Get the arm angle of the selected channel
